notes: The strategy defines canonical tags and parent relationships, not map geometry.
MeshMapper polygons are the preferred assignment evidence where a strategy crosswalk exists; raw source polygons are never published as regions.
Every remaining Statistics Canada dissemination area is assigned once by the deterministic national generator.

authority.partitionRule: one digital DA to exactly one geographic leaf

attribution.label: Inspired by Adam Gessaman's PNW MeshCore region tools

retiredCanonicalTags.hdn: Replaced by separate hald and norf leaves
retiredCanonicalTags.ncr: Replaced by adjacent Ottawa and Outaouais leaves; retained only as a non-geographic search group
retiredCanonicalTags.lloyd: Replaced by lloyd-ab and lloyd-sk at the Alberta-Saskatchewan boundary
